title: Cross-orchestrator Spec Vocabulary v1
description: Shared spec schema for AppSec / QA / UIUX / GSD orchestrator workflow bases. Skill emits a spec matching this schema; the domain workflow base interprets it. CAVEAT-applied: additionalProperties:false everywhere, type-specific required fields, strict path-safe patterns.

domain_runtime_version.description: Per-orchestrator runtime version (e.g. qa-0.1.0, appsec-1.0.0). Bumped when domain registry/preset shape changes incompatibly. ORCHESTRATION-MIGRATION-PLAN.md §1.11 #16.

preset_name.description: Identifier matching preset filename stem (e.g. graph-smoke, quick-check, focused-qa-gate). Optional self-describing field for preset templates.

mode.description: Mode label that triggers this preset's selection. Optional self-describing field for preset templates.

context.description: Skill main thread fills runtime-only fields like risk_snapshot (per R4 Option A), release_tag, run_id, critical_release_paths, policy. Workflow body MAY read these into ctx.<field>.

_estimate.description: Self-describing budget/wallclock/evidence metadata. Preview renderer reads these; Workflow body ignores. Optional.

model_policy_version.description: §1.11 correction #2 (2026-05-28). Skill writes sha256: prefixed snapshot of resolved override map + default mapping. Workflow body includes this in node_fingerprint so any policy-mapping change invalidates resume cache.

_note.description: Free-form doc note for preset authors (Workflow ignores).

_doc_ref.description: Citation to authoritative blueprint/plan section (Workflow ignores).

_when.description: Human description of when this preset fires (Workflow ignores).

_banner.description: Preview banner text (Skill renders, Workflow ignores).

_d1_caveat.description: QA Phase B D1 roadmap caveat note.

_r9_note.description: Inline note pinning to reviewer R9 audit-gate pattern.

_r13_note.description: Inline note pinning to reviewer R13 budget reconciliation.

_resolved_model_policy.description: Dual-layer model rule: model alias is production abstraction (skill resolves); resolved_model in preset JSON is pre-baked TEST/DEV default capped at haiku|sonnet. Workflow ignores; documentation only.

allow_dynamic_workflow.description: Governed Gate Mode field (2026-05-29, post-4.8). false (and absent ⇒ false) means: this spec's release/security verdict MUST come from the deterministic spec-runner walking these exact phases — a model-authored Dynamic Workflow may NOT produce the verdict. Governed presets (release-readiness / commercial-cert / l3-payment / incident-response / pentest gates) MUST set false. Bound into spec_hash so the human approval pins it. Dynamic Workflows remain fine for exploration/migration OUTSIDE the gate. See CLAUDE.md Governed Gate Mode.

_execution_profile.description: Self-describing execution-governance profile (2026-05-29, post-4.8). Preview renderer surfaces it and spec-hash includes it (so approval pins it); the Workflow body IGNORES it (underscore-prefixed). NOTE: effort/speed/thinking are SESSION-level controls captured here for audit reproducibility only — native agent() has no effort/speed/thinking parameter as of Claude Code 2.1.154, so the runner does NOT pass them per-agent. resolved_model_at_approval records the concrete model id the alias resolved to at approval time for the audit trail; it does NOT override the preset's test-capped resolved_model.

effort.description: Intended session effort (Opus 4.8 default high; xhigh for hardest gates; max only when justified).

speed.description: Orthogonal to model tier. Governed gates default standard — never route a gate verdict node to fast mode by default; fast/standard do not share prompt cache.

thinking.description: Opus 4.8/4.7 support adaptive thinking only; manual budget_tokens is rejected.

resolved_model_at_approval.description: Audit-only concrete model id captured at approval (e.g. claude-opus-4-8). Documentation/audit field; does NOT change node.resolved_model (which stays test-capped per the dual-layer rule).

stall_ms.description: Reviewer R8 (2026-05-28) — per-node Workflow tool stall_ms override. Long-running QA/AppSec/L12 layers (E2E / npm audit / Lighthouse / visual / a11y / perf) routinely exceed default 180s. Integer milliseconds.

timeout_policy.description: Reviewer R8 — symbolic timeout-policy label. Documents WHY stall_ms is set; hashNode includes this so policy changes invalidate cache. Lower-case identifier.

prompt_ref_by_kind.description: QA fanout pattern — per-item kind dispatches different prompts (e.g. component vs api-contract). Skill resolves at launch.

schema_ref_by_kind.description: QA fanout pattern — per-item kind dispatches different schemas.

_width_range.description: Dynamic fanout width range [min, max]. Skill picks N in range at runtime based on changed-surface count etc. Workflow body ignores; the actual width comes from items_from resolution.

_items_range.description: Dynamic pipeline-items range [min, max]. Analogous to _width_range for pipeline.

_smoke_pin_width.description: When preset is graph-smoke / smoke, fanout width is pinned to this fixed value (per ORCHESTRATION-MIGRATION-PLAN.md §1.11 #14). Skill MUST pin items to this exact count, ignoring any dynamic _width_range.

_smoke_pin_items.description: Pipeline analog of _smoke_pin_width. Smoke pipelines pinned to exactly this many items.

_dispatch_note.description: Inline note documenting agentType dispatch policy at this phase (e.g. dual-handler scope, runner migration history). B.1.f addition 2026-05-29.

model.description: Aliases (preferred): cheap_fast | balanced | strongest_available | inherit. Bare legacy: haiku | sonnet | opus. Versioned legacy: haiku-4.5 | sonnet-4.6 | opus-4.8 etc.

resolved_model.description: §1.11 correction #2 (2026-05-28). Skill pre-resolves the alias to a literal model name. If present, Workflow body uses this directly and does NOT re-resolve. If absent, Workflow body falls back to its built-in resolveModel() for backward-compat with pre-v1.11 args.

name.description: Optional stage label for pipeline stages (e.g. 'prepare', 'run-validate').

stall_ms.description: Reviewer R8 — per-stage Workflow tool stall_ms override.

model.description: Aliases (preferred): cheap_fast | balanced | strongest_available | inherit. Bare legacy: haiku | sonnet | opus. Versioned legacy: haiku-4.5 | sonnet-4.6 | opus-4.8 etc.

resolved_model.description: §1.11 correction #2 (2026-05-28). Skill pre-resolves the alias to a literal model name. If present, Workflow body uses this directly and does NOT re-resolve. If absent, Workflow body falls back to its built-in resolveModel() for backward-compat with pre-v1.11 args.
